title: Kaunas、Kaunas County — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Kaunas、Kaunas Countyの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

KaunasはKaunas Countyにある人口295,269の都市です。Lithuania’s second city and a 2022 European Capital of Culture, known for its interwar modernist architecture, the Kaunas Castle, and a vibrant student life.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
